name: open-science-skills
description: Claude Code skills for experimental social science methodology

plugins.name: open-science-skills
plugins.description: 11 skills for experimental social science: conjoint design and diagnostics, survey design, list experiments, cross-national design, topic modeling, LLM text classification, hypothesis building, narrative building, pre-registration, and methods reporting. All skills auto-trigger from context and are available as /skill-name slash commands.
